title: Create New Child Board From Parent Template Directly.
excerpt:

posts.author: KSegWin (Kevin Seguin [Monday Ambassador])
posts.cookedHtml:
The Parent Template beta has been great so far, and I’m looking forward to seeing how it develops.

One piece of feedback I have for the product team is that there is no way to create a Child Board from one specific template; one needs to duplicate the entire workspace. Currently, one needs to use a unique workspace to manage one template. This will create multiple unnecessary workspaces.
